title: Minecraft Extra
description: A Minecraft mod that upgrades the combat and farming systems and adds some other handy features to make your life better.
body:
# Description
This mod adds hardened Netherite tools and armour, new bosses, useful farming features like disabling trampling and automated replanting, new building blocks, and many other helpful features like a fullbright key.

# Languages
- English
- German

Do you speak another language? I’d be happy if you sent me a translation.
